headline: Woman's Shadow Has A 'Bad Attitude,' Refuses To Follow Her On Dark Days
summary: The shadow has become 'selectively supportive' and only appears on 'good vibes days.'
fullBody: Amanda McShadow's shadow has developed 'attitude issues.' 'It refused to follow me yesterday,' Amanda said. 'It just stayed on the ground.' The shadow is now a 'conditional companion,' only appearing on 'good vibes days.' Amanda has tried negotiating. 'I offered better lighting,' Amanda said. 'It's not enough.' The shadow is currently 'taking space.'
